'''shadhozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oilometer|oilometer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-dh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oilometer|oilometer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shadhozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shædhezeth|shædhezeth]] || [[word:shædhezej|shædhezej]] || [[word:shædhezesh|shædhezesh]] || [[word:shædheze|shædheze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shadhodhozoth|shadhodhozoth]] || [[word:shadhodhozoj|shadhodhozoj]] || [[word:shadhodhozosh|shadhodhozosh]] || [[word:shadhodhozo|shadhodhozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shadhozoth|shadhozoth]] || [[word:shadhozoj|shadhozoj]] || [[word:shadhozosh|shadhozosh]] || [[word:shadhozo|shadhozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shadhofzoth|shadhofzoth]] || [[word:shadhofzoj|shadhofzoj]] || [[word:shadhofzosh|shadhofzosh]] || [[word:shadhofzof|shadhofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shadhozotho|shadhozotho]] || [[word:shadhozojo|shadhozojo]] || [[word:shadhozosho|shadhozosho]] || [[word:shadhozoko|shadhozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shadhozoth|shadhozoth]] || [[word:shadhozoj|shadhozoj]] || [[word:shadhozosh|shadhozosh]] || [[word:shadhozo|shadhozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shadhozothol|shadhozothol]] || [[word:shadhozojol|shadhozojol]] || [[word:shadhozoshol|shadhozoshol]] || [[word:shadhozokol|shadhozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shadhozothotho|shadhozothotho]] || [[word:shadhozojojo|shadhozojojo]] || [[word:shadhozoshosho|shadhozoshosho]] || [[word:shadhozoko|shadhozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shadhozothon|shadhozothon]] || [[word:shadhozojon|shadhozojon]] || [[word:shadhozoshon|shadhozoshon]] || [[word:shadhozokon|shadhozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shadhozothoro|shadhozothoro]] || [[word:shadhozojoro|shadhozojoro]] || [[word:shadhozoshoro|shadhozoshoro]] || [[word:shadhozokoro|shadhozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
